translations.en: The emergency exit is back there.
translations.es: La salida de emergencia está allí al fondo.
translations.fr: La sortie de secours est au fond.
translations.it: L'uscita di emergenza è in fondo.
translations.ru: Аварийный выход вон там, в конце.
translations.pt: A saída de emergência fica lá no fundo.
translations.vi: Lối thoát hiểm ở đằng sau kia.
translations.uk: Аварійний вихід он там, в кінці.
translations.pl: Wyjście awaryjne jest tam z tyłu.
translations.el: Η έξοδος κινδύνου είναι στο βάθος.
translations.id: Pintu darurat ada di belakang sana.
translations.ro: Ieșirea de urgență este acolo în spate.
translations.ja: 非常口はあちらの奥です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determines the subject noun Notausgang.
Common noun; masculine; singular; head of the subject NP in nominative case.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular, present); links the subject to the predicative locative phrase.
Deictic adverb; together with hinten forms the predicate ‘da hinten’ indicating location.
Locative adverb; head of the predicative adverbial phrase ‘da hinten’ in a copular clause.

translations.en: We’re sitting right by the emergency exit.
translations.es: Estamos sentados justo al lado de la salida de emergencia.
translations.fr: On est assis juste à côté de la sortie de secours.
translations.it: Siamo seduti proprio vicino all'uscita di emergenza.
translations.ko: 우리는 비상구 바로 옆에 앉아 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们就坐在紧急出口旁边。
translations.yue: 我哋就坐喺緊急出口旁邊。
translations.ru: Мы сидим прямо у аварийного выхода.
translations.pt: Estamos sentados bem ao lado da saída de emergência.
translations.he: אנחנו יושבים ממש ליד יציאת החירום.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ngồi ngay cạnh lối thoát hiểm.
translations.ar: نحن جالسون بجانب مخرج الطوارئ مباشرة.
translations.nl: We zitten vlak bij de nooduitgang.
translations.uk: Ми сидимо прямо біля аварійного виходу.
translations.hi: हम आपातकालीन निकास के बिल्कुल पास बैठे हैं.
translations.el: Καθόμαστε ακριβώς δίπλα στην έξοδο κινδύνου.
translations.id: Kami duduk tepat di sebelah pintu darurat.
translations.ro: Stăm chiar lângă ieșirea de urgență.
translations.ja: 非常口のすぐそばに座っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb (1st person plural, present); intransitive; denotes a static posture/location.
Degree/stance adverb; intensifies the following PP, yielding ‘right at ...’.
Contraction of the preposition ‘an’ + article ‘dem’; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun; masculine singular; object of the preposition (dative) in the PP ‘am Notausgang’.

translations.en: I can’t find the emergency exit.
translations.es: No encuentro la salida de emergencia.
translations.fr: Je ne trouve pas la sortie de secours.
translations.it: Non riesco a trovare l'uscita di emergenza.
translations.ru: Я не могу найти аварийный выход.
translations.pt: Não consigo encontrar a saída de emergência.
translations.he: אני לא מוצא את יציאת החירום.
translations.vi: Tôi không tìm thấy lối thoát hiểm.
translations.ar: لا أستطيع العثور على مخرج الطوارئ.
translations.nl: Ik kan de nooduitgang niet vinden.
translations.uk: Я не можу знайти аварійний вихід.
translations.hi: मुझे आपातकालीन निकास नहीं मिल रहा है.
translations.el: Δεν μπορώ να βρω την έξοδο κινδύνου.
translations.id: Saya tidak bisa menemukan pintu darurat.
translations.ja: 非常口が見つかりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb (1st person singular, present); transitive; selects a direct object.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun; masculine singular; direct object (accusative) of ‘finde’.
Negation particle; negates the predicate ‘finde den Notausgang’.

sentences.target: Da steht was vor dem Notausgang.

translations.de: Da steht was vor dem Notausgang.
translations.en: There’s something in front of the emergency exit.
translations.es: Hay algo delante de la salida de emergencia.
translations.fr: Il y a quelque chose devant la sortie de secours.
translations.it: C'è qualcosa davanti all'uscita di emergenza.
translations.pt: Tem alguma coisa na frente da saída de emergência.
translations.tr: Acil çıkışın önünde bir şey var.
translations.vi: Có thứ gì đó ở trước lối thoát hiểm.
translations.nl: Er staat iets voor de nooduitgang.
translations.hi: आपातकालीन निकास के सामने कुछ है.
translations.el: Υπάρχει κάτι μπροστά στην έξοδο κινδύνου.
translations.id: Ada sesuatu di depan pintu darurat.
translations.ro: Este ceva în fața ieșirii de urgență.
translations.ja: 非常口の前に何かあります。

tokens.explanation: Deictic adverb placed clause-initially; sets a locative frame (‘there’).
Main verb (3rd person singular, present); intransitive; denotes position/location.
Indefinite pronoun (colloquial for ‘etwas’); subject of the clause in nominative.
Preposition governing dative for static location; introduces the PP ‘vor dem Notausgang’.
Definite article; dative masculine singular; determiner within the PP.
Common noun; masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘vor’ (dative) indicating reference point.
